ocr_findings.description: LaTeX-style bullet marker '$\bullet$' appears in OCR for '● 完成責任...' and '● 労働関連法規の用語' section headers. These are rendering artifacts from the OCR math-mode detection, not a content loss.
試験にはコレが出る! mascot image rendered as img placeholder; the three bullet points within the box are fully captured in text.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 労働契約と著作権帰属 table (個人的な趣味/雇用契約/労働者派遣契約/請負契約 with 完成責任/契約不適合責任/著作権 columns) and the 準委任契約/フレックスタイム制/裁量労働制 terms table (p.69). Both tables are correctly captured in markdown. Label confirmed as content.
